name: Farmers State Bank
description_short: Cameron, MO's Farmers State Bank at 124 E 3rd St serves local banking needs for residents and small businesses.
description_long:
Farmers State Bank's Cameron branch is located at 124 E 3rd St, right in the heart of downtown Cameron, MO. This standalone facility offers in-person banking services for the local community. While specific hours aren't listed online, you can call ahead or visit during typical business hours.

At this Cameron location, you can handle standard banking needs including account opening, deposits, withdrawals, and financial services. Contact the 124 E 3rd St branch directly for specific service availability, current rates on deposits and loans, and any questions about products offered at this Cameron branch.

If you're a Cameron resident or business owner in MO, this downtown branch provides a local banking option with face-to-face service. Bring a valid ID for account transactions, and take advantage of the convenient downtown location. Farmers State Bank's community focus means supporting local banking where you live.
services: Consumer checking accounts with online account opening
Savings accounts with online account opening
Retail online banking platform with login and enrollment
Mobile banking and digital wallet services
Debit card services with card management capabilities
Swipe Out Hunger community charitable giving program
pros: Free checking account option (inCENTive) with customizable rewards
Online account opening available for consumer checking and savings accounts
Community giving program integrated into debit card usage (Swipe Out Hunger)
Comprehensive digital banking platform including mobile banking and digital wallet
Dual online banking platforms for both retail and business customers
Mortgage loan specialists available for personalized lending consultation
Card management services for debit card administration
cons: Homepage lacks specific information on account fees, minimum balances, or APY rates
No details provided about mortgage loan terms, rates, or product types offered
Limited geographic information available; unclear service area and branch locations
Minimal transparency about inCENTive rewards program structure and earning rates
No information on business lending products despite offering business online banking
best_for: Community-minded consumers seeking local banking relationships over national chain institutions
First-time homebuyers in Farmers State Bank's service region looking for personalized mortgage guidance
Small business owners seeking dual online banking platforms and local relationship management
diagnosis: Farmers State Bank is best for consumers in their service region seeking traditional community banking with free checking options and digital convenience, plus a desire to support local food bank initiatives. The primary caveat is the near-complete absence of specific product details, rates, fees, and terms on their public website, requiring direct contact to evaluate competitive offerings.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Cameron, MO: Farmers State Bank at 124 E 3rd St. Local banking for residents and businesses.
